item.title: GUYS. Taylor and I were laying in bed last night & stumbled back across this “old” TikTok we posted. This was one of our first videos ever. I was crying laughing so hard, yet we were nervous for a couple hours because of how much salt I actually made him
item.description: By @taylorrandsoph: GUYS. Taylor and I were laying in bed last night & stumbled back across this “old” TikTok we posted. This was one of our first videos ever. I was crying laughing so hard, yet we were nervous for a couple hours because of how much salt I actually made him
